pillars.title: Economy & Work
pillars.text: E‑commerce, gig income and export services create new jobs while lowering entry barriers.

pillars.title: Education & Skills
pillars.text: LMS platforms, MOOCs and blended models broaden access to learning.

pillars.title: Culture & Community
pillars.text: Social platforms connect voices across cities; video, music and film dialogue across identities.

pillars.title: Civic Life & Services
pillars.text: E‑governance, utility apps and tele‑health shorten time for everyday tasks.

pillars.title: Inclusion & Access
pillars.text: Digital rails unlock remote work; affordability initiatives bring more people online.

pillars.title: Safety & Rights
pillars.text: Digital rights advocacy responds to privacy, security and expression concerns.

cases.title: Freelance boom across second‑tier cities
cases.text: Low entry costs + platforms created remote earning for designers, devs and translators beyond major hubs.

cases.title: Ed‑tech for underserved learners
cases.text: Recorded lessons, WhatsApp micro learning and LMS pilots helped students bridge gaps during outages and closures.

cases.title: Small merchants go online
cases.text: Marketplaces and POS apps enabled payments, inventory and delivery without heavy capex.
